name: international_security_heat_dome_stresses_cedar_tru_loy
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In International Security, the situation tagged internally around international security heat dome stresses cedar tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Keisha Bennett
agents.identity: I am Keisha Bennett, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in International Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Serrano
agents.identity: I am Hector Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in International Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Keisha Bennett must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Keisha Bennett do?
